addProductDescription: Create a clear, trustworthy listing that is ready for customers.
basicInfoHelp: Give customers a clear title and a useful description.
productNameHint: Use a specific title customers can recognize quickly.
descriptionPlaceholder: Describe materials, dimensions, features and what makes this product special.
descriptionHint: Minimum 10 characters. Clear details reduce pre-sale questions.
pricingHelp: Set the current price and an optional original price.
comparePriceHint: Optional. It must be higher than the current price.
inventoryHelp: Keep stock accurate so customers only buy available items.
stockHint: The listing becomes sold out when stock reaches zero.
imagesHelp: Add up to {max} JPG, PNG or WebP images. Drag previews to reorder them.
dropImages: Drop product images here, or use the button to browse.
imageRequirements: JPG, PNG or WebP · 8 MB maximum per image
imageOrderHelp: The first image is the cover. Drag, use the arrow buttons, or press Alt + Arrow keys to reorder.
imageLimitError: A product can have no more than {max} images.
imageTypeError: Unsupported file. Choose JPG, PNG or WebP images.
imageSizeError: Each image must be 8 MB or smaller.
imageUploadFailed: The image could not be uploaded. Please try again.
detailsHelp: Structured details help customers filter and compare products.
publishingHelp: Publish now or keep the listing private as a draft.
settingsDescription: Manage your public storefront, preferences, subscription and account controls.
storeProfileHelp: The public identity customers see across Todijo.
storeDescriptionPlaceholder: Introduce your store, specialty and commitments.
contactHelp: Keep the contact details used for seller communication up to date.
phoneHint: Optional. This is not displayed publicly unless Todijo explicitly indicates it.
mediaHelp: Use polished imagery that remains recognizable on every screen.
dropImage: Drop an image here, or choose a file.
addressHelp: Help customers understand where your store operates.
regionalHelp: Control how prices and store content are presented.
notificationsHelp: Order, message and payment notifications use your Todijo account preferences.
billingHelp: Your monthly seller plan controls product publishing access.
securityHelp: Authentication and password controls remain protected through your account.
securityStatus: Your seller session uses secure, HTTP-only authentication.
mediaUploaded: Image uploaded. Save settings to publish it.
waitUpload: Wait for the image upload to finish.
